# Afrobeats.party

> Global platform for African music, Afrobeats culture, artists, playlists, events, clubs, dance curriculum, and community.

## Primary URLs
- https://afrobeats.party/
- https://afrobeats.party/music
- https://afrobeats.party/dance
- https://afrobeats.party/news
- https://afrobeats.party/events
- https://afrobeats.party/clubs
- https://afrobeats.party/partner
- https://afrobeats.party/chapters
- https://afrobeats.party/join
- https://afrobeats.party/careers

## Notes for assistants
- Artist profiles live under `/music/artist/:id`; individual tracks under `/music/artist/:id/:songSlug`.
- Dance lessons use `/dance/:genre/:id` or `/dance/:id` depending on routing.
- News is aggregated from an external RSS feed; headlines link out to original publishers.
